title: Business Operations & Guild Model
frameworks: Guild Hierarchy: apprentice → journeyman → master → guild lead
Onboarding: application → screening → trial period → full membership
Service Catalog: web development, branding, marketing, AI integration, consulting
Training Program: technical skills → client skills → leadership track
concepts: 20/80 commission split incentivizes guild members while sustaining studio operations
Guild progression is skill-based: apprentices learn, journeymen deliver, masters mentor
Onboarding is a structured workflow with gates — no automatic progression
Service offerings must be standardized enough to price but flexible enough to customize
Training serves dual purpose: skill development and quality assurance
Every business operation maps to a state machine with documented transitions
context: Extracted from ordostudio — a guild-based creative studio operating model with 20% studio / 80% member commission splits, tiered guild hierarchy (apprentice through guild lead), structured onboarding workflows, standardized service catalogs, and integrated training programs. All operations are modeled as state machines with governance rules.
